name: ValueInputControlData
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for NemAll_Python_IFW_Input.ValueInputControlData.)

constructors.name: ValueInputControlData(ctrlType, bSetFocus, bDisableCoord)
constructors.summary: Constructor to create a control with standard behavior defined by the control type
constructors.remarks: Constructor to create a control with standard behavior defined by the control type

params.name: bSetFocus
params.doc: Set the input focus to the control: true/false

params.name: bDisableCoord
params.doc: Input inside the external control disables the coordinate controls: true/false

constructors.name: ValueInputControlData(ctrlType, initValue, bSetFocus, bDisableCoord)
constructors.summary: Constructor to create a control with an init value. The value range is defined by the control type
constructors.remarks: Constructor to create a control with an init value. The value range is defined by the control type

params.name: bSetFocus
params.doc: Set the input focus to the control: true/false

params.name: bDisableCoord
params.doc: Input inside the external control disables the coordinate controls: true/false
